name: @the-staq/tradestaq-mcp
description: MCP server for automated crypto trading. 31 tools for AI agents: create strategies, backtest, deploy trading bots, copy trade, monitor positions, and manage portfolios on Binance, Bybit, OKX, and more. Works with Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client.

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public

author: TradeStaq <hello@tradestaq.com>
